response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled software craftsman with extensive technical expertise and a strong open-source background. However, he falls short on critical requirements for this executive-level Head of Development role, most notably lacking the mandatory C1 German proficiency (listed as basic) and demonstrating insufficient formal experience in executive team management, operational leadership, and enterprise IT consulting.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience in modern software development and microservices architecture.
Deep involvement in open-source technologies, including founding an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Holds a relevant University degree in Computer Science with a strong technical foundation.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory C1 German language requirement (currently listed as Basic).
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership and formal team management experience.
Missing required expertise in formal UML modeling, enterprise IT security, and compliance.
